title: Edit Distance
problem_statement: Compute the minimum number of insertions, deletions, and substitutions to convert one string into another.
intuition: Define dp on prefixes and consider all edit operations for the last characters.

approaches.name: Levenshtein Distance DP
approaches.description: Use a 2D DP table where dp[i][j] is the minimum edits to convert word1[0..i-1] to word2[0..j-1].
approaches.why_not: Recursive search without memoization duplicates many edit paths.

interview_qa.q: What are the three operations in edit distance?
How does dp[i][j] use previous values?
interview_qa.a: It uses dp[i-1][j], dp[i][j-1], and dp[i-1][j-1] based on the chosen edit operation.
